Hey, you've covered the first ten rules of the close. Now you're ready to know the remaining ten. Starting with how you're going to use a smile to melt that buyer down, how to literally melt objections and get agreement. You're going to also learn how to use agreement to get what you want. You're going to learn how to use the power of acknowledgement. 99% of all closers that I have met do not acknowledge and do not use the power of this secret called the power of acknowledgement to close deals. And you're going to find out how to find a solution even when there doesn't appear to be one. You will know exactly how to locate it.
